title: The Puzzled Game-Birds - (Triolet)
content:
They are not those who used to feed us
    When we were young - they cannot be -
    These shapes that now bereave and bleed us?
    They are not those who used to feed us, -
    For would they not fair terms concede us?
    - If hearts can house such treachery
    They are not those who used to feed us
    When we were young - they cannot be!
meaning:
Thomas Hardy's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Puzzled Game-Birds - (Triolet)"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
